sections.title: Une erreur à éviter : confondre PM et PPM

Le PPM : outil de gestion de portefeuille

sections.note: Live has each subsection with its own SVG image; extraction collapses into subSections without images. Content faithful.

sections.title: Les différentes visions de la gestion de projet
sections.note: Live has 3 separate sections with images; extraction merged as subSections losing images.

sections.title: Deux visions de DSI - pyramides Maslow
sections.note: Live has TWO Maslow pyramid SVGs side by side (outil14a.svg + outil14b.svg); extraction shows only one. This is a known SVG diagram, not a product mockup.

sections.title: Visions opposées de la gestion de projets
Un outil PPM intuitif - Jira
sections.note: imageSrc is an SVG icon (outil18a.svg), not a real product mockup. Faithful to live but flagged per rule.

sections.title: Microsoft Teams
sections.note: imageSrc is an SVG icon (outil18b.svg). Faithful to live but flagged.

sections.title: Un outil PPM avec une UX forte
Méthodologie collaborative pour impliquer les métiers

sections.title: AirSaas : le logiciel PPM nouvelle génération

audit.summary: Extraction is faithful and well-structured. All major sections present in the correct order. Minor issues: (1) Maslow pyramids feature-split shows only one of two SVGs; (2) Jira and Teams sections use SVG icons rather than product mockups (faithful to live, but icons not mockups); (3) Some intro subSections in the historical/visions parts collapse what live presents as multiple feature blocks with side images — content preserved but accompanying SVGs dropped. No hallucinations detected.
